JD Vance (@JDVance)

The appropriate number of illegal immigrants voting in our elections is ZERO.

We can make that a reality if we pass the SAVE America Act into law today.

Perfect timing from the White House!

Today I introduced legislation to allow these waivers for American businesses. 

It’s time to cut this 106-year-old red tape so Americans can support energy from our own ports instead of being forced to rely on Russian gas.


Fox News (@FoxNews)

BREAKING: White House considering temporary Jones Act waiver to keep shipments moving to U.S. ports, Leavitt tells Fox News





— https://nitter.net/FoxNews/status/2032119398274576567#m

Let’s put an end to the misinformation: the SAVE America Act helps Americans to prove their citizenship & identity without spending a dime. 

With that cleared up, I look forward to my Democrat colleagues supporting this wildly popular & important election security legislation!

Video

Thirty years ago today, we lost Rex E. Lee.

Lawyer. Teacher. Solicitor General. University president.

But to us, he was simply Dad.

I miss him every day.

Video

USADF’s financial director pled guilty to accepting bribes & crony million-dollar government contracts.  

Democrats cheered USADF blocking DOGE audits to hide theft & corruption.

I’m urging @TheJusticeDept to vigorously investigate this fraud against the American people.

THANK YOU @SenatorTimScott! 🔥🔥🔥

"I think the talking filibuster would actually improve comity in our chamber and require us to be present. That might pull some Democrats off the sidelines and get them to vote for this bill. Because at the end of the day, this is about voter integrity, and every demographic in the country, Joe, supports it. Why not do common sense? Make America proud!"

Video

Somali fraud rings: *steal hundreds of millions of dollars from Americans*

Democrats: is rice people? 🤔

Video

The problem is even worse than we thought! 🤣


Andrew Kolvet (@AndrewKolvet)

Chuck Schumer says the SAVE America Act allows ICE to kick off "TENS OF BILLIONS" of people off voter rolls. 

We've all assumed there was shenanigans going on, but apparently it's much worse than we suspected.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/AndrewKolvet/status/2031454692916518998#m

America would be a safer country without sanctuary cities.

More Americans would be alive today if illegal criminals were immediately deported, rather than shielded.

Video

Sanctuary states and cities undermine federal law enforcement and make our communities more dangerous for American families.

Video

Glenn Beck (@glennbeck)

This is the real reason why the Senate hasn’t passed the SAVE America Act.
